title: Process High-Value Purchase Order
summary: Validate a high-value purchase order, obtain approval, and submit it to the vendor.
entry_conditions: A purchase order above the manager review threshold is ready for processing.

total_amount.description: Total value of the purchase order.

entities.name: Budget Ledger
entities.description: System of record for remaining department budget.

nodes.name: Open purchase order
nodes.instruction: Open the purchase order record and review the vendor, amount, and requested items.
completion_checks: The purchase order details are visible.

recovery.instructions: Pause for review if the purchase order record cannot be found or key order details are incomplete.

nodes.name: Verify budget availability
nodes.instruction: Check the department budget ledger and confirm that sufficient budget remains for the purchase order.
completion_checks: Available budget has been checked against the order total.

recovery.instructions: Ask the user for direction if the ledger is unavailable or the remaining budget cannot be verified confidently.

risk.reason: Budget review influences downstream approval but does not change external state.

nodes.name: Is budget sufficient?
nodes.question: Does the department budget cover the full order amount?
nodes.evaluation_hint: Compare available budget with total_amount after reserving mandatory commitments.

nodes.name: Get manager approval
nodes.reason: High-value orders require explicit manager approval before vendor submission.

nodes.name: Submit order to vendor
nodes.instruction: Submit the approved purchase order to the vendor using the procurement portal.
completion_checks: The procurement portal confirms the order was submitted.

risk.reason: Submitting the order creates an external procurement commitment with the vendor.

recovery.instructions: Stop and report the failure if submission status is unclear or the portal reports an error.

nodes.name: Record approval block
nodes.instruction: Document that the purchase order cannot proceed because budget or approval requirements were not satisfied.
completion_checks: The purchase order record includes the reason the process stopped.

recovery.instructions: Pause for review if the rejection reason is ambiguous.

risk.reason: The status change can stop a purchase order from moving forward until corrected.

transitions.condition: Budget is sufficient for the order
Budget is insufficient or cannot be confirmed

provenance.observed_vs_inferred_summary: Record review, budget validation, approval gating, and vendor submission were observed. Failure and denial handling was inferred from policy and workflow context.
